```{r}
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    text_color = ifelse(avg_expression > 5,
                       "black", "white")
  ) %>%
  left_join(markers)


percent_cells = 
  df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene, CellType) %>%
  summarize(
    percent_expressing = mean(Expression > 0) * 100,
    n_cells = n(),
    n_expressing = sum(Expression > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

percent_cells_wide = 
  plot_data %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(id_cols = "Gene", 
                     names_from="CellType", 
                     values_from = "percent_expressed")

gene_rows = percent_cells_wide$Gene
percent_cells_wide$Gene = NULL
percent_cells_mat = as.matrix(percent_cells_wide)
rownames(percent_cells_mat) = gene_rows 

if(length(goi) > 2){
  gene_dist <- dist(percent_cells_mat)
  gene_clust <- hclust(gene_dist, method = "ward.D2")
  gene_order <- gene_clust$labels[gene_clust$order]
  percent_cells$Gene = factor(percent_cells$Gene, levels = gene_order)
  plot_data$Gene = factor(plot_data$Gene, levels = gene_order)
}

# Create bubble plot
plot_data$CellType = factor(plot_data$CellType, levels = anno_all)

library(ggnewscale)

bubble = 
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = CellType, y = Gene)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = percent_expressed, color = avg_expression)) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name = "% Expressed",
    range = c(1, 5)  # min and max bubble size
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C",
                        name = "Avg Expression") +
  new_scale_color() + 
  geom_text(
    data = plot_data %>% filter(FDR<.01, summary.logFC > 0.5),  
    aes(label = "*", color = text_color),
    size = 2,
    vjust = 0.6,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7, 
                               color = "black",
                               face = "italic",
                               family = "sans"),
  )


# -------------------------------------------
# 6. Colors
# -------------------------------------------

all_label_colors = c("#1F77B4", "#AEC7E8", "#FF7F0E", "#FFBB78",
                     "#2CA02C", "#98DF8A", "#D62728", "#FF9896", 
                     "#9467BD", "#C5B0D5", "#8C564B", "#C49C94", 
                     "#E377C2", "#F7B6D2", "#7F7F7F", "#C7C7C7", 
                     "#BCBD22", "#DBDB8D", "#17BECF")

label_colors = all_label_colors[1:length(unique(percent_cells$CellType))] 

names(label_colors) = unique(percent_cells$CellType)

# -------------------------------------------
# 7. Annotation bar
# -------------------------------------------

anno_bar <- ggplot(percent_cells, aes(x = CellType, y = 1, fill = CellType)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(label_colors, "NA" = "white"), na.value = "white", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    #legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(.4, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(.4, "cm"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(0, 5, 0, 40)
  ) 
```

```{r, fig.width = 6.5 , fig.height=9, eval=TRUE}
all_tsne_tag =  all_tsne + labs(tag="A")  + theme(legend.position = "none")
anno_bar_tag = anno_bar + labs(tag="B") 
  
free(all_tsne_tag,type = "label") / 
  (anno_bar_tag / bubble + plot_layout(heights = c(0.03, 1))) + 
  plot_layout(ncol =1, height =c(1,3), guides = "collect") & 
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 10, face="bold"))

ggsave(file = paste0(results_dir, "/fig1_long.png"), width =6.5 ,height=9)
```

(A) t-SNE visualization of all cells colored by annotated cell types. (B) Dot plot showing average expression of and percentage of cells expressing selected marker genes across identified cell types. The color scale represents average log-normalized expression across cells expressing the gene within a cell type, with yellow indicating high expression and blue indicating low expression. The size of each dot represents the percentage of cells expressing each gene within a cluster. An asterisk indicates the gene is significantly enriched in the cell-type (FDR < 0.01, log2 fold change > 0.50). In some cases, gene names are derived from homologous proteins from humans and other species as reported by Wang et al.

## Figure 2. Germ cell lineage trajectory shows progression from primordial germ cells to maturing oogonia and spermatocytes.

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=8}

library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(viridis)

#PGC = c("PRDM1","BMP2.2","PRDM1.1","TRRAP","RUNX1T1","WNT5A","PRDM12","UBA1","KIT","RANBP2", "NANOS1", "PUM1", "CPEB1")

PGC = c("PRDM1","BMP2.2","PRDM1.1","WNT5A","PRDM12","UBA1","KIT","RANBP2", "NANOS1", "PUM1", "CPEB1", "ZP4.3", "CUZD1.15", "PIWIL1", "FN3KRP")

sce = combined.sex.sce

library(tibble)
goi = 
  gene_description %>%
  filter(WangGeneID %in% PGC) %>%
  select(WangGeneID, Gene) %>%
  deframe()

goi = goi[goi %in% rownames(sce)]

sce.plot = sce[goi,]

goi_names = 
  gene_description %>%
  filter(Gene %in% goi) %>%
  select(Gene, WangGeneID) %>%
  deframe()

goi_names = goi_names[goi]

rownames(sce.plot) = goi_names

mat <- logcounts(sce.plot)
mat = as.matrix(mat)

meta <- as.data.frame(colData(sce.plot))
meta <- meta %>% arrange(label)

df_long <- as.data.frame(mat) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-Gene, names_to = "Cell", values_to = "Expression") %>%
  left_join(meta %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("Cell"), by = "Cell") %>%
  select(Gene, Cell, CellType, Expression)

markers = read.csv(paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_marker_genes.csv"), row.names = 1)

cluster_index = as.numeric(gsub("cluster_","",markers$cluster))
markers$CellType = anno[cluster_index]

markers = 
  markers %>%
  select(WangGeneID, CellType, FDR, summary.logFC) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Gene = "WangGeneID")

plot_data <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene, CellType) %>%
  summarize(
    percent_expressed = mean(Expression > 0) * 100,
    avg_expression = mean(Expression[Expression > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(
    scaled_expression = scale(avg_expression)[,1]  # Z-score by gene
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    text_color = ifelse(avg_expression > 5,
                       "black", "white")
  ) %>%
  left_join(markers)

percent_cells = 
  df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene, CellType) %>%
  summarize(
    percent_expressing = mean(Expression > 0) * 100,
    n_cells = n(),
    n_expressing = sum(Expression > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

percent_cells_wide = 
  percent_cells %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(id_cols = "Gene", 
                     names_from="CellType", 
                     values_from = "percent_expressing")

gene_rows = percent_cells_wide$Gene
percent_cells_wide$Gene = NULL
percent_cells_mat = as.matrix(percent_cells_wide)
rownames(percent_cells_mat) = gene_rows 

if(length(goi) > 2){
  gene_dist <- dist(percent_cells_mat)
  gene_clust <- hclust(gene_dist, method = "ward.D2")
  gene_order <- gene_clust$labels[gene_clust$order]
  percent_cells$Gene = factor(percent_cells$Gene, levels = gene_order)
  plot_data$Gene = factor(plot_data$Gene, levels = gene_order)
  
}


# -------------------------------------------
# 6. Colors
# -------------------------------------------

all_label_colors = c("#1F77B4", "#AEC7E8", "#FF7F0E", "#FFBB78",
                     "#2CA02C", "#98DF8A", "#D62728", "#FF9896", 
                     "#9467BD", "#C5B0D5", "#8C564B", "#C49C94", 
                     "#E377C2", "#F7B6D2", "#7F7F7F", "#C7C7C7", 
                     "#BCBD22", "#DBDB8D", "#17BECF")

label_colors = all_label_colors[1:length(unique(percent_cells$CellType))] 

names(label_colors) = unique(percent_cells$CellType)

# -------------------------------------------
# 7. Annotation bar
# -------------------------------------------

anno_bar <- ggplot(percent_cells, aes(x = CellType, y = 1, fill = CellType)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(label_colors, "NA" = "white"), na.value = "white", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    #legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(.4, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(.4, "cm"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(0, 5, 0, 40)
  ) 
#+ 
#labs(title = names(list_of_dfs)[i])

# -------------------------------------------
# 8. Heatmap
# -------------------------------------------

plot_data$CellType = factor(plot_data$CellType, levels = anno)

library(ggnewscale)

bubble = 
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = CellType, y = Gene)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = percent_expressed, color = avg_expression)) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name = "% Expressed",
    range = c(.5, 4)  # min and max bubble size
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C",
                        name = "Avg Expression") +
  new_scale_color() + 
  geom_text(
    data = plot_data %>% filter(FDR<.01, summary.logFC > 0.5),  
    aes(label = "*", color = text_color),
    size = 3,
    vjust = 0.6,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7, 
                               color = "black",
                               face = "italic",
                               family = "sans"),
  )

# -------------------------------------------
# 9. Combine
# -------------------------------------------

anno_no_leg = anno_bar + theme(legend.position = "none") + labs(tag="A")
bubble_no_leg = bubble + theme(legend.position = "none")

gr_fixed <- gr_plot + coord_fixed(clip = "off") + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0))
gr_fixed_no_leg = gr_fixed + theme(legend.position = "none") + labs(tag = "B")

pseudo_plot_tag = pseudo_plot + labs(tag = "C")

library(cowplot)

legend_anno = get_legend(anno_bar)

bubble = 
  bubble + theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 10))

legend_bubble = get_legend(bubble)

legend_gr = get_plot_component(gr_plot, "guide-box", return_all = TRUE)[[2]]

main = anno_no_leg / bubble_no_leg + plot_layout(heights = c(0.05, 1))
leg = wrap_elements(legend_bubble) + wrap_elements(legend_anno) + plot_layout(widths = c(1,2))

top = (main | leg) + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5,2))

# bottom = (((pseudo_plot_tag / legend_gr)+plot_layout(heights = c(1,1.5))) | gr_fixed_no_leg) + plot_layout(widths = c(1,2.5))
bottom = (gr_fixed_no_leg | (pseudo_plot_tag / legend_gr)+plot_layout(heights = c(1,1.5))) + plot_layout(widths = c(2.5,1))

fig2 =
  top / bottom +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.5,2)) &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 10, face="bold"))
  
ggsave(fig2, file = paste0(results_dir, "/fig2.png"), width = 8, height = 8)

fig2
```

(A) Dot plot showing average expression of and percentage of cells expressing selected PCG marker genes across identified cell types. The color scale represents average log-normalized expression across cells expressing the gene within a cell type, with yellow indicating high expression and blue indicating low expression. The size of each dot represents the percentage of cells expressing each gene within a cluster. An asterisk indicates the gene is significantly enriched in the cell-type (FDR < 0.01, log2 fold change > 0.50). In some cases, gene names are derived from homologous proteins from humans and other species as reported by Wang et al. (See supplemental table X aka gene_descritption.csv) (B) Minimal spanning tree showing developmental relationships between germline populations. Each pie-chart node represents a cluster.  The colors correspond to the proportion of cells from each sample within the cluster. (B) t-SNE plot of germline cells colored by pseudotime. Numbers correspond to cluster labels. The black line indicates the principal pseudotime path.

## Figure 3. Sex-specific germ cell differentiation branch analysis

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height=7}
path_tag = path_plot + labs(tag = "A", title = "Branch membership")

fplot_tag = fplot + 
  labs(tag = "B", title = "Female branch") + 
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

mplot_tag = mplot + 
  labs(tag = "C", title = "Male branch") + 
  theme(legend.position = "none")

f_anno_tag = f_anno_bar + labs(tag = "D", title = "Female branch")

m_anno_tag = m_anno_bar + labs(tag = "E", title = "Male branch")

top = free(path_tag + fplot_tag + mplot_tag, type = "label") &
        theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 8))

bottom = (f_anno_tag / f_heatmap_plot + plot_layout(heights = c(0.025, 1))) |
(m_anno_tag / m_heatmap_plot + plot_layout(heights = c(0.025, 1))) 

top / bottom + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1,3.5), guides = "collect") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 10, face="bold"), 
        plot.title = element_text(size = 8, face = "plain"))

ggsave(file = paste0(results_dir, "/fig3.png"), width = 8, height=7)
```

A-C) Scatter plot of cluster 14 cells showing each cell’s branch assignment (A), pseudotime on the female-specific branch (B), and pseudotime on the male-specific branch (C). Cells are plotted in low-dimensional MNN-corrected space, with trajectories indicated by black lines. (D–E) Heatmaps showing scaled expression of the top genes uniquely associated with the female (D) and male (E) pseudotime trajectories. Each column represents an individual cell ordered by pseudotime progression, and each row corresponds to a gene. The color scale indicates relative expression (Z-score) across cells with red indicating high expression and blue indicating low expression. In some cases, gene names are derived from homologous proteins from humans and other species as reported by Wang et al. 

# Clean SCEs with meta data

## All cells

pca and lognormcounts form individual samples

```{r}
combined.sce.final = combined.sce
combined.sce.final$Size_Factor = NULL
combined.sce.final$cluster = NULL
combined.sce.final$discard = NULL
saveRDS(combined.sce.final, paste0(results_dir, "/combined.sce.final.Rds"))

merged.sce.final = merged.sce
colData(merged.sce.final) = colData(combined.sce.final)
merged.sce.final$monocole_cluster = NULL
saveRDS(merged.sce.final, paste0(results_dir, "/merged.sce.final.Rds"))
```

## Germ cells
```{r}
merged.sex.sce.final = merged.sex.sce
merged.sex.sce.final$all.merged.clusters = NULL
merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.15 = NULL
merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.4 = NULL
merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.9 = NULL
merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.7 = NULL

merged.sex.sce.final$CommonPseudotime = merged.sex.sce.final$Pseudotime
merged.sex.sce.final$Pseudotime = NULL

merged.sex.sce.final$FemaleBranchPseudotime = merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.2
merged.sex.sce.final$MaleBranchPseudotime = merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.8
merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.2 = NULL
merged.sex.sce.final$TSCAN.8 = NULL

```

# Session info
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
